tools.name: get_events
tools.description: Query the deduped news event graph by theme, source, category and time window. Returns events (many articles about one happening collapsed into one), each with a corroboration count and confidence score. This is the primary tool — prefer it over raw articles. The corpus spans 260+ global outlets and

tools.name: get_event
tools.description: Fetch a single event by id, including every corroborating article (source, url, timestamp).

tools.name: search_articles
tools.description: Search raw articles (not collapsed into events). Use when you want the underlying items or need per-outlet coverage rather than deduped happenings.

tools.name: list_sources
tools.description: List all news sources Newsflash tracks, with categories and live article counts.

tools.name: corpus_stats
tools.description: Corpus size and freshness: source / article / event counts and the latest article timestamp.
